Lifelink

[i][i]Uprising[/i] — [/i]When this creature enters, target opponent reveals a number of cards from their hand equal to the number of other Rebels you control. You choose one of those cards. That player discards that card.

Haste

When this creature enters or you cycle it, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

• Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater.

Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature is a Citizen and can't become untapped. [i](It also loses all other creature types.)[/i]

Whenever this creature attacks, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.
{R}: This creature gains haste until end of turn.
Whenever you discard one or more cards, this creature gets +1/+1 and gains menace until end of turn.

When this enchantment enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
{3}{W}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Create two 1/1 white Bird creature tokens with flying. Activate only as a sorcery.

Haste
Whenever you discard one or more cards, this creature deals 1 damage to target player.
Cycling {1}{R} [i]({1}{R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)[/i]

When this creature dies, amass Soldiers 2. [i](Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)[/i]
Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life.

Enchant land
Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {G}.
{4}{G}, Sacrifice this Aura: Take to the streets. You gain 3 life. [i](If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)[/i]

This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.
[i]Raid[/i] — This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if you attacked this turn.

Defender
Whenever you take to the streets, this creature can attack this turn as though it didn't have defender.
Cycling {1}{U} [i]({1}{U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)[/i]

Enchant creature
Enchanted creature can't attack or block.
{1}{W}: Exile enchanted creature. You gain 2 life. Activate only if you took to the streets this turn.

[i]Uprising[/i] — If you controlled a Rebel as you cast this spell, you gain 2 life.

Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying.
[i]Uprising[/i] — If you controlled a Rebel as you cast this spell, add one mana of any color.

Smash and Grab deals 1 damage to any target.
[i]Raid[/i] — If you attacked this turn, draw a card.

Up to one target creature gets -4/-0 until end of turn.
Draw a card.

Target creature you control gains flying and indestructible until end of turn.
Take to the streets. [i](If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)[/i]
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. If you sacrificed an Army this way, create a Treasure token.

{T}: Tap target creature with power 2 or less.

As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards.

When this creature enters, target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
Cycling {B} [i]({B}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)[/i]

Reach
[i]Raid[/i] — When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it if you attacked this turn.

Flying, vigilance
When this creature enters, Army creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain flying until end of turn.

Trample
[i]Raid[/i] — {4}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you attacked this turn. Activate only once each turn.
Whenever you discard one or more cards, this creature gets +1/+0 and can't be blocked this turn.
When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

[i]Raid[/i] — This spell costs {2} less to cast if you attacked this turn.
Draw two cards.

When this creature enters, tap target creature you don't control and put a stun counter on it.
{2}{B}: Take to the streets. Activate only as a sorcery. [i](If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)[/i]

[i]Uprising[/i] — This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a Rebel.
Rewire deals 3 damage to any target.

{T}: Add {R}.
Whenever another Rebel you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

Vigilance, reach
[i]Uprising[/i] — When this creature enters, if you control another Rebel, draw a card.

Draw two cards.
Amass Soldiers 2. [i](Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)[/i]

During turns other than yours, this Vehicle is an artifact creature.
Crew 2 [i](Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)[/i]
Cycling {UB} [i]({UB}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)[/i]

Haste, menace
[i]Uprising[/i] — At the beginning of your end step, if you control another Rebel, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.
[i]Raid[/i] — If you attacked this turn, create a Treasure token.

Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life and take to the streets. [i](If you don't have a Watchtower emblem, you get one. During your next combat phase, you may attack the Watchtower.)[/i]

Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.
Amass Soldiers 2. [i](Put two +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Soldier. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Soldier Army creature token first.)[/i]
Draw two cards. Then you may discard a nonland card. When you do, Let it Rip deals 5 damage to target creature.

Destroy target creature or planeswalker.
[i]Uprising[/i] — If you controlled a Rebel as you cast this spell, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control.

When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Rebels you control gain first strike until end of turn.
